question: How do I install my new VJneon sign?
answer: Installing our neon signs is as simple as hanging a picture frame! All signs come with pre-drilled holes in the acrylic backing and a free wall mounting kit (screws and standoffs). You can mount the sign directly to the wall or hang it from the ceiling using our steel wire suspension kits. Once mounted, simply connect the sign to the dimmer controller, plug it into the 12V power adapter, and plug the adapter into any standard wall outlet.

question: What is the turnaround time for a custom neon sign?
answer: Our standard production and delivery time is 7 to 10 business days from the date of design approval. We also offer an Express Shipping option at checkout, which prioritizes your sign in our workshop and delivers it within 4 to 6 business days.

question: Can I use my LED neon sign outdoors?
answer: By default, our signs are designed for indoor use. However, we offer an outdoor weatherproofing upgrade (IP67 certified) for all signs, including custom designs. This protects the LEDs and wiring from rain, snow, and dust, making them perfect for storefront facades and outdoor events.

question: What is included in the package with my sign?
answer: Every VJneon sign package includes: (1) Your hand-crafted LED Neon Sign, (2) AC Power Adapter with local plug configuration, (3) Dimmer and remote control kit, (4) Chrome wall-mounting standoffs and screws, and (5) A 2-Year warranty card with installation instructions.

question: Do you offer a warranty on your products?
answer: Yes! We stand by our craftsmanship. All indoor signs come with a 2-Year Manufacturer Warranty covering any electrical defects or material malfunctions. Outdoor signs include a 1-Year Warranty.

question: Can I upload my own company logo or custom artwork?
answer: Absolutely! You can upload your vector file, logo image, or complex graphics directly on our 'Upload Your Design' page. Our team of experienced designers will analyze your artwork and email you a free 3D digital mockup and price quotation within 12 hours.
